# @async-fn/vitest

> Late-resolve async mocks for Vitest. `asyncFn()` returns a `vi.fn()`-compatible mock whose returned promise resolves from the test body, after the system under test has called it. This lets tests read chronologically.

## Documentation

- [LLM Usage](./LLM_USAGE.md): compact API reference with examples
- [README](./README.md): full tutorial and rationale
